children.heading: 1862 Institution
children.label: 1 1862 Institution
children.text: The term “1862 Institution” means a college or university eligible to receive funds under the Act of (, chapter 130; et seq.).July 2, 186212 Stat. 5037 U.S.C. 301

children.heading: 1890 Institution
children.label: 2 1890 Institution
children.text: The term “1890 Institution” means a college or university eligible to receive funds under the Act of (, chapter 841; et seq.), including Tuskegee University.August 30, 189026 Stat. 4197 U.S.C. 321

children.heading: 1994 Institution
children.label: 3 1994 Institution
children.text: The term “1994 Institution” means 1 of the 1994 Institutions (as defined in section 532 of the Equity in Educational Land-Grant Status Act of 1994 (; note)) (as amended by section 251(a)).Public Law 103–3827 U.S.C. 301

children.heading: Advisory Board
children.label: 4 Advisory Board
children.text: The term “Advisory Board” means the National Agricultural Research, Extension, Education, and Economics Advisory Board established under .section 3123 of this title

children.heading: Department
children.label: 5 Department
children.text: The term “Department” means the Department of Agriculture.

children.heading: Hispanic-serving agricultural colleges and universities
children.label: 6 Hispanic-serving agricultural colleges and universities
children.text: The term “Hispanic-serving agricultural colleges and universities” has the meaning given the term in .section 3103 of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 7 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.
